title: Dossier
description: A scaffold-agnostic lego brick: an integration (third-party provider) or a UI-section pattern. Source of truth: docs/architecture/dossier-format.md

id.description: Kebab-case unique id. Must match the directory name.

kind.description: integration = ties to a third-party provider; ui-section = pure UI building block.

dependencies.description: npm package names that must be added to package.json

injectionMode.description: How the file reaches the generated project. `inline` = LLM may rewrite (default for UI components). `verbatim` = LLM must emit the file unchanged (default for api-routes, middleware, config, util in integration dossiers — paraphrasing webhook signing or auth glue is risky). Override per file when default doesn't fit.

scaffoldFit.description: Soft ranking hint, not a filter. All dossiers are available to all scaffolds. `primary` boosts embedding rank by ~+0.15, `compatible` by ~+0.05.

_source.description: Where this dossier came from. Free-form but use stable values: hand-curated, vercel-light-catalog, shadcn-blocks, manual-import, etc.

_status.description: Lifecycle + source-health. Only `active` dossiers are matched against prompts at runtime. `draft` = not yet curated. `source-archived`/`source-stale`/`source-unreachable` = compat-test flagged the GitHub source as bad; dossier is excluded from runtime selection until reviewed.

_curatedAt.description: ISO timestamp when the dossier was last finalized (hand or auto).

_curatedBy.description: Who or what produced this dossier. Examples: 'hand', 'auto-curate.ts', '<github-username>'.

_extractedAt.description: Set by extract-files-from-cache.ts. Cleared once dossier is curated.

_extractedFromCache.description: Set by extract-files-from-cache.ts. Cleared once dossier is curated.

_envExampleCopied.description: Set by extract-files-from-cache.ts. Cleared once dossier is curated.

_deprecationReason.description: Human-readable note about why the dossier was flagged. Set by hand or by compat-test workflows when a dossier source is broken. Informational only; runtime filtering is driven by `_status`.

_replacementUrl.description: If the source repo has been replaced/sunset, link to the new authoritative source so a re-curation pass knows where to look.
